title: Enhanced Allays
description: This data pack makes allays teleport to the player or to their noteblock, much like how dogs and cats teleport. It also adds the option to make allays immortal.
body:
### Video: https://youtu.be/Z_L3IO1kkhk ### 1.21.6+ Features: * Teleports allays to their owner if they are 64 blocks away from them, unless nametaged or in a vehicle * Allays trapped in or above walls, fences, fence gates, composters, (filled) cauldrons and hoppers don't teleport ever * Teleports allays to their note block if they are outside the 16 m range and their timer runs out, unless nametaged or in a vehicle * handy in watery environments where allays are slower * has suffocation protection by teleporting them on top of the note block (there is always air above working note blocks) * has leash functionality to counter this note block feature * Allays leashed by players cannot like note blocks and thus follow the player * Shearing an allay causes it to lose its custom name
Invulnerable Allays Add-on * `/trigger invulnerable_allays` makes **your** allays immortal * trigger again to make them mortal again * **If** server owners don't want immortal allays, admins with OP may use `/function tpallays:toggle_invulnerability` to toggle between allowing and disallowing invulnerable allays * Invulnerable allays are reset when disabled. * 'invulnerable allays' is disabled by default
---
1.21.5 * Teleports allays to their owner if they are 64 blocks away from them, unless nametaged or in a vehicle * Allays trapped in or above walls, fences, fence gates, composters, (filled) cauldrons and hoppers don't teleport ever * Teleports allays to their note block if they are outside the 16 m range and their timer runs out, unless nametaged or in a vehicle * handy in watery environments where allays are slower * has suffocation protection by teleporting them on top of the note block (there is always air above working note blocks) * has leash functionality to counter this note block feature * Allays leashed by players cannot like note blocks and thus follow the player * Naming an allay "unname" causes it to lose its custom name * `/trigger invulnerable_allays` makes **your** allays immortal * trigger again to make them mortal again * **If** server owners don't want immortal allays, admins with OP may use `/function tpallays:toggle_invulnerability` to toggle between allowing and disallowing invulnerable allays * Invulnerable allays are reset when disabled. * 'invulnerable allays' is disabled by default
1.21.4 * Teleports allays to their owner if they are 64 blocks away from them, unless nametaged or in a vehicle * Allays trapped in or above walls, fences, fence gates, composters, (filled) cauldrons and hoppers don't teleport ever * Teleports allays to their note block if they are outside the 16 m range and their timer runs out, unless nametaged or in a vehicle * handy in watery environments where allays are slower * has suffocation protection by teleporting them on top of the note block (there is always air above working note blocks) * has leash functionality to counter this note block feature * Allays leashed by players cannot like note blocks and thus follow the player * Naming an allay "unname" causes it to lose its custom name * `/trigger invulnerable_allays` makes **your** allays immortal * trigger again to make them mortal again * **If** server owners don't want immortal allays, then go into the data pack file > data > tpallays > functions and remove `invulnerable.mcfunction` (this is enabled by default)
1.20.5 – 1.21.3 * Teleports allays to their owner if they are 64 blocks away from them, unless nametaged * Allays trapped in or above walls, fences, fence gates, composters, (filled) cauldrons and hoppers don't teleport ever * Teleports allays to their note block if they are outside the 16 m range and their timer runs out, unless nametaged * handy in watery environments where allays are slower * has suffocation protection by teleporting them on top of the note block (there is always air above working note blocks) * has leash functionality to counter this note block feature * Allays leashed by players cannot like note blocks and thus follow the player * Naming an allay "unname" causes it to lose its custom name (<– broken due to bug MC-128225) * `/trigger invulnerable_allays` makes **your** allays immortal * trigger again to make them mortal again * **If** server owners don't want immortal allays, then go into the data pack file > data > tpallays > functions and remove `invulnerable.mcfunction` (this is enabled by default)
Older Check the changelog tab for a more accurate picture, these versions differ greatly.
Allays have more issues in Minecraft: Allays might be my favourite mob, but they are plagued with issues that this data pack might adress in the future. Meanwhile, please vote for this bug MC-278599 and browse through other bugs
--- ### notice - If you want to support small creators like me, you can turn off ad blocker. - Check out my profile for more creations: https://modrinth.com/user/TQNL Keep in mind: - Ensure you're familiar with installing data packs. Verify compatibility with your Minecraft version. Terms of use: Do: - Use and modify the data pack for private use. - Credit me (ThijquintNL) as the creator when using the data pack in public, such as in video showcases, or when editing and redistributing the original material.
